name: Gold Rush
description: Add gold pips to one dice on 3 sides

description: Add purple pips to one dice on 2 sides

name: Spirit Guide
description: Add blue pips to one dice on 1 side

name: Deputize

name: Blood Moon
description: Add ghost aura to random item, -1 re-roll

name: Spirit Shaman

name: Raid

name: Priest's Blessing

name: Magic Beans
description: Create rare item, money is set to $0

name: Spiritual Journey
description: Increase all trail knowledge by 1 (very rare)
